{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid from datetime import datetime app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'users': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Fatima Khan', 'email': 'fatima@email.com', 'password_hash': 'hashed', 'role': 'teacher'}, {'id': '2', 'name': 'Ali Hassan', 'email': 'ali@email.com', 'password_hash': 'hashed', 'role': 'student'}, {'id': '3', 'name': 'Sara Malik', 'email': 'sara@email.com', 'password_hash': 'hashed', 'role': 'designer'}, ], 'boards': [ {'id': '1', 'title': 'Math Class — Algebra Session', 'created_at': '2026-04-01', 'shared_with': ['ali@email.com', 'sara@email.com'], 'owner': 'Fatima Khan', 'color': 'blue', 'notes': 'Use for quadratic equations revision.'}, {'id': '2', 'title': 'Product Wireframe Sprint 3', 'created_at': '2026-04-05', 'shared_with': ['fatima@email.com'], 'owner': 'Sara Malik', 'color': 'purple', 'notes': 'Final round of UI feedback collection.'}, {'id': '3', 'title': 'Physics — Wave Motion', 'created_at': '2026-04-08', 'shared_with': ['ali@email.com'], 'owner': 'Fatima Khan', 'color': 'emerald', 'notes': 'Diagrams for wave diagrams and explanations.'}, {'id': '4', 'title': 'Team Brainstorm — Q2 Goals', 'created_at': '2026-04-10', 'shared_with': ['fatima@email.com', 'ali@email.com'], 'owner': 'Sara Malik', 'color': 'orange', 'notes': 'Key goals and OKRs for Q2 planning session.'}, ], 'drawings': [ {'id': '1', 'board_id': '1', 'drawing_data': 'line|50,50,200,200|#374151|2', 'created_at': '2026-04-01'}, {'id': '2', 'board_id': '1', 'drawing_data': 'rect|80,80,300,150|#10b981|2', 'created_at': '2026-04-02'}, {'id': '3', 'board_id': '2', 'drawing_data': 'circle|150,150,60|#6366f1|2', 'created_at': '2026-04-05'}, ], 'comments': [ {'id': '1', 'board_id': '1', 'user_id': '2', 'user_name': 'Ali Hassan', 'comment_text': 'Should we add the quadratic formula derivation here?', 'created_at': '2026-04-02'}, {'id': '2', 'board_id': '1', 'user_id': '1', 'user_name': 'Fatima Khan', 'comment_text': 'Yes, great idea! I will add it in the next session.', 'created_at': '2026-04-02'}, {'id': '3', 'board_id': '2', 'user_id': '1', 'user_name': 'Fatima Khan', 'comment_text': 'The button placement looks off, let us discuss.', 'created_at': '2026-04-06'}, ] } @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'boards': db['boards'][:3]} ) @app.get('/boards', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def boards(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='boards.html', context={'boards': db['boards']} ) @app.post('/boards') async def create_board(title: str = Form(...), notes: str = Form(default='')): colors = ['blue', 'purple', 'emerald', 'orange', 'rose', 'teal'] import random db['boards'].append({ 'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'title': title, 'created_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), 'shared_with': [], 'owner': 'Current User', 'color': random.choice(colors), 'notes': notes }) return RedirectResponse(url='/boards', status_code=303) @app.get('/boards/{board_id}', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def board_detail(request: Request, board_id: str): board = next((b for b in db['boards'] if b['id'] == board_id), None) if not board: return RedirectResponse(url='/boards', status_code=303) drawings = [d for d in db['drawings'] if d['board_id'] == board_id] comments = [c for c in db['comments'] if c['board_id'] == board_id] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='board_detail.html', context={'board': board, 'drawings': drawings, 'comments': comments} ) @app.post('/boards/{board_id}/comment') async def add_comment(board_id: str, user_name: str = Form(...), comment_text: str = Form(...)): db['comments'].append({ 'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'board_id': board_id, 'user_id': '1', 'user_name': user_name, 'comment_text': comment_text, 'created_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }) return RedirectResponse(url=f'/boards/{board_id}', status_code=303) @app.post('/boards/{board_id}/drawing') async def save_drawing(board_id: str, drawing_data: str = Form(...)): db['drawings'].append({ 'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'board_id': board_id, 'drawing_data': drawing_data, 'created_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }) return RedirectResponse(url=f'/boards/{board_id}', status_code=303) @app.get('/api/boards') async def api_boards(): return {'boards': db['boards']} @app.post('/api/boards') async def api_create_board(data: dict): return {'status': 'created', 'board_id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5]} @app.get('/api/boards/{board_id}') async def api_board_detail(board_id: str): board = next((b for b in db['boards'] if b['id'] == board_id), {}) return {'board': board} @app.post('/api/boards/{board_id}/drawings') async def api_save_drawing(board_id: str, data: dict): return {'status': 'drawing saved'} @app.post('/api/boards/{board_id}/comments') async def api_add_comment(board_id: str, data: dict): return {'status': 'comment added'} "}, {"path": "templates/base.html", "content": " DrawBoard | Collaborative Whiteboard
DrawBoard
My Boards

{% block content %}{% endblock %}
© 2026 DrawBoard. Real-Time Collaborative Whiteboard Platform.

{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid from datetime import datetime app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'users': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Ali Hassan', 'email': 'ali@email.com', 'role': 'user'}, {'id': '2', 'name': 'Admin', 'email': 'admin@park.com', 'role': 'admin'}, ], 'parking_spots': [ {'id': 'A1', 'location': 'Block A — Level 1', 'status': 'Available', 'capacity': 1, 'price_per_hour': 2.50, 'type': 'Standard'}, {'id': 'A2', 'location': 'Block A — Level 1', 'status': 'Occupied', 'capacity': 1, 'price_per_hour': 2.50, 'type': 'Standard'}, {'id': 'B1', 'location': 'Block B — Level 2', 'status': 'Available', 'capacity': 1, 'price_per_hour': 3.00, 'type': 'Covered'}, {'id': 'B2', 'location': 'Block B — Level 2', 'status': 'Available', 'capacity': 1, 'price_per_hour': 3.00, 'type': 'Covered'}, {'id': 'C1', 'location': 'Block C — Basement', 'status': 'Reserved', 'capacity': 1, 'price_per_hour': 4.00, 'type': 'Premium'}, {'id': 'C2', 'location': 'Block C — Basement', 'status': 'Available', 'capacity': 1, 'price_per_hour': 4.00, 'type': 'Premium'}, {'id': 'EV1', 'location': 'EV Zone — Level 1', 'status': 'Available', 'capacity': 1, 'price_per_hour': 5.00, 'type': 'EV Charging'}, {'id': 'EV2', 'location': 'EV Zone — Level 1', 'status': 'Occupied', 'capacity': 1, 'price_per_hour': 5.00, 'type': 'EV Charging'}, ], 'reservations': [ {'id': 'RES001', 'spot_id': 'A2', 'user_id': '1', 'user_name': 'Ali Hassan', 'reserved_at': '2026-04-10 09:00', 'duration_hours': 2, 'status': 'Active'}, {'id': 'RES002', 'spot_id': 'C1', 'user_id': '1', 'user_name': 'Ali Hassan', 'reserved_at': '2026-04-08 14:00', 'duration_hours': 3, 'status': 'Completed'}, ], 'payments': [ {'id': 'PAY001', 'reservation_id': 'RES001', 'amount': 5.00, 'payment_method': 'Card'}, {'id': 'PAY002', 'reservation_id': 'RES002', 'amount': 12.00, 'payment_method': 'Cash'}, ] } @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): available = sum(1 for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['status'] == 'Available') occupied = sum(1 for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['status'] == 'Occupied') reserved = sum(1 for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['status'] == 'Reserved') highlights = db['parking_spots'][:4] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'available': available, 'occupied': occupied, 'reserved': reserved, 'highlights': highlights} ) @app.get('/spots', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def spots(request: Request, q: str = '', status: str = '', spot_type: str = ''): results = db['parking_spots'] if q: results = [s for s in results if q.lower() in s['location'].lower() or q.lower() in s['id'].lower()] if status: results = [s for s in results if s['status'] == status] if spot_type: results = [s for s in results if s['type'] == spot_type] types = sorted(set(s['type'] for s in db['parking_spots'])) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='spots.html', context={'spots': results, 'types': types, 'q': q, 'sel_status': status, 'sel_type': spot_type} ) @app.get('/spots/reserve', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def reserve_form(request: Request, spot_id: str = ''): available_spots = [s for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['status'] == 'Available'] selected = next((s for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['id'] == spot_id), None) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='reserve_spot.html', context={'spots': available_spots, 'selected': selected, 'success': False} ) @app.post('/spots/reserve', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def reserve_submit( request: Request, spot_id: str = Form(...), duration_hours: int = Form(...), payment_method: str = Form(...) ): spot = next((s for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['id'] == spot_id), None) total = 0 reservation_id = '' if spot and spot['status'] == 'Available': spot['status'] = 'Reserved' total = spot['price_per_hour'] * duration_hours reservation_id = 'RES' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:4].upper() db['reservations'].append({ 'id': reservation_id, 'spot_id': spot_id, 'user_id': '1', 'user_name': 'Current User', 'reserved_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'), 'duration_hours': duration_hours, 'status': 'Active' }) db['payments'].append({ 'id': 'PAY' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:4].upper(), 'reservation_id': reservation_id, 'amount': total, 'payment_method': payment_method }) available_spots = [s for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['status'] == 'Available'] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='reserve_spot.html', context={'spots': available_spots, 'selected': None, 'success': True, 'booked_spot': spot, 'total': total, 'reservation_id': reservation_id} ) @app.get('/admin', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def admin_dashboard(request: Request): total_revenue = sum(p['amount'] for p in db['payments']) available = sum(1 for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['status'] == 'Available') occupied = sum(1 for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['status'] == 'Occupied') reserved = sum(1 for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['status'] == 'Reserved') enriched_res = [] for r in db['reservations']: spot = next((s for s in db['parking_spots'] if s['id'] == r['spot_id']), {}) pay = next((p for p in db['payments'] if p['reservation_id'] == r['id']), {}) enriched_res.append({**r, 'location': spot.get('location', '—'), 'amount': pay.get('amount', 0), 'payment_method': pay.get('payment_method', '—')}) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='admin_dashboard.html', context={'spots': db['parking_spots'], 'reservations': enriched_res, 'total_revenue': total_revenue, 'available': available, 'occupied': occupied, 'reserved': reserved} ) @app.get('/api/spots') async def api_spots(): return {'spots': db['parking_spots']} @app.post('/api/spots/reserve') async def api_reserve(data: dict): return {'status': 'reserved', 'reservation_id': 'RES' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:5]} @app.post('/api/payments') async def api_payments(data: dict): return {'status': 'payment_processed', 'transaction_id': 'TXN' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:6]} @app.get('/api/admin/dashboard') async def api_admin_dashboard(): return {'spots': db['parking_spots'], 'reservations': db['reservations'], 'payments': db['payments']} "}, {"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid from datetime import datetime app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'shelters': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Happy Paws Shelter', 'location': 'Islamabad, Pakistan', 'phone_number': '051-1234567', 'website': 'happypaws.pk', 'pets_count': 12, 'distance_km': 2.4}, {'id': '2', 'name': 'Safe Haven Rescue', 'location': 'Lahore, Pakistan', 'phone_number': '042-7654321', 'website': 'safehaven.pk', 'pets_count': 8, 'distance_km': 5.1}, {'id': '3', 'name': 'Furever Friends', 'location': 'Karachi, Pakistan', 'phone_number': '021-9988776', 'website': 'furever.pk', 'pets_count': 20, 'distance_km': 1.8}, ], 'pets': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Bruno', 'age': 2, 'breed': 'Labrador', 'description': 'Friendly and energetic dog who loves outdoor walks.', 'available': True, 'shelter_id': '1', 'type': 'Dog'}, {'id': '2', 'name': 'Mochi', 'age': 1, 'breed': 'Persian', 'description': 'Calm and affectionate indoor cat.', 'available': True, 'shelter_id': '2', 'type': 'Cat'}, {'id': '3', 'name': 'Rocky', 'age': 4, 'breed': 'German Shepherd', 'description': 'Loyal and intelligent, great with families.', 'available': False, 'shelter_id': '1', 'type': 'Dog'}, {'id': '4', 'name': 'Luna', 'age': 3, 'breed': 'Siamese', 'description': 'Playful and vocal cat who loves attention.', 'available': True, 'shelter_id': '3', 'type': 'Cat'}, {'id': '5', 'name': 'Max', 'age': 1, 'breed': 'Beagle', 'description': 'Curious and cheerful puppy full of energy.', 'available': True, 'shelter_id': '3', 'type': 'Dog'}, {'id': '6', 'name': 'Whiskers', 'age': 5, 'breed': 'Maine Coon', 'description': 'Gentle giant who enjoys quiet evenings.', 'available': True, 'shelter_id': '2', 'type': 'Cat'}, ], 'adoptions': [ {'id': 'APP001', 'shelter_id': '1', 'pet_id': '1', 'pet_name': 'Bruno', 'applicant_name': 'Zara Ahmed', 'applicant_email': 'zara@email.com', 'status': 'Pending', 'created_at': '2026-04-01'}, {'id': 'APP002', 'shelter_id': '2', 'pet_id': '2', 'pet_name': 'Mochi', 'applicant_name': 'Bilal Khan', 'applicant_email': 'bilal@email.com', 'status': 'Approved', 'created_at': '2026-04-03'}, {'id': 'APP003', 'shelter_id': '3', 'pet_id': '4', 'pet_name': 'Luna', 'applicant_name': 'Fatima Malik', 'applicant_email': 'fatima@email.com', 'status': 'Rejected', 'created_at': '2026-04-05'}, ] } @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'shelters': db['shelters']} ) @app.get('/shelters', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def shelters(request: Request, max_distance: str = ''): results = db['shelters'] if max_distance: results = [s for s in results if s['distance_km'] <= float(max_distance)] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='shelters.html', context={'shelters': results, 'sel_distance': max_distance} ) @app.get('/adopt-pets', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def adopt_pets(request: Request, breed: str = '', age: str = '', pet_type: str = ''): results = db['pets'] if breed: results = [p for p in results if breed.lower() in p['breed'].lower()] if age: results = [p for p in results if str(p['age']) == age] if pet_type: results = [p for p in results if p['type'] == pet_type] breeds = sorted(set(p['breed'] for p in db['pets'])) ages = sorted(set(str(p['age']) for p in db['pets'])) types = sorted(set(p['type'] for p in db['pets'])) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='adopt_pets.html', context={'pets': results, 'breeds': breeds, 'ages': ages, 'types': types, 'sel_breed': breed, 'sel_age': age, 'sel_type': pet_type} ) @app.post('/api/adoptions') async def apply_adoption( pet_id: str = Form(...), shelter_id: str = Form(...), applicant_name: str = Form(...), applicant_email: str = Form(...) ): pet = next((p for p in db['pets'] if p['id'] == pet_id), {}) db['adoptions'].append({ 'id': 'APP' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:4].upper(), 'shelter_id': shelter_id, 'pet_id': pet_id, 'pet_name': pet.get('name', ''), 'applicant_name': applicant_name, 'applicant_email': applicant_email, 'status': 'Pending', 'created_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }) return RedirectResponse(url='/admin-panel', status_code=303) @app.get('/admin-panel', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def admin_panel(request: Request): enriched = [] for a in db['adoptions']: shelter = next((s for s in db['shelters'] if s['id'] == a['shelter_id']), {}) enriched.append({**a, 'shelter_name': shelter.get('name', '—')}) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='admin_panel.html', context={'applications': enriched, 'pets': db['pets'], 'shelters': db['shelters']} ) @app.post('/admin-panel/update-status') async def update_status(application_id: str = Form(...), status: str = Form(...)): for a in db['adoptions']: if a['id'] == application_id: a['status'] = status return RedirectResponse(url='/admin-panel', status_code=303) @app.get('/api/shelters') async def api_shelters(): return {'shelters': db['shelters']} @app.get('/api/pets') async def api_pets(): return {'pets': db['pets']} @app.get('/api/admin/applications') async def api_applications(): return {'applications': db['adoptions']} @app.patch('/api/admin/applications/{app_id}') async def api_update_status(app_id: str, data: dict): for a in db['adoptions']: if a['id'] == app_id: a['status'] = data.get('status', a['status']) return {'status': 'updated'} @app.put('/api/admin/shelters') async def api_update_shelter(data: dict): return {'status': 'shelter updated'} "}, {"path": "templates/base.html", "content": " PawsHome | Pet Adoption Platform
PawsHome
Shelters Adopt Pets Admin Panel
Find a Pet
{% block content %}{% endblock %}
© 2026 PawsHome. Connecting Pets with Loving Families.

Adopt a Pet
